title: Paleo-Friendly Pan-Seared Tunisian Lamb Tagine
description: A flavorful and refreshing Tunisian dish made with pan-seared lamb, fresh vegetables, and a blend of aromatic spices, all cooked in a traditional clay tagine.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in the bottom of a clay tagine or a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb to the pan and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion, garlic, ginger, cumin, garam masala, paprika, and salt to the pan and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the lemon juice to the pan and stir to combine.
Cover the pan with a lid and transfer it to the oven.
Bake the lamb in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until it is cooked through.
Stir in the chopped parsley and cook for 1 minute.
Serve the lamb hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
